nodes.label: 1. AI-Driven Enterprise Architecture: A Strategic Powerhouse
nodes.text: 1. AI-Driven Enterprise Architecture: A Strategic Powerhouse
nodes.author: www.boc-group.com

nodes.label: Artificial Intelligence (AI) is redefining the way businesses plan and execute E
nodes.text: Artificial Intelligence (AI) is redefining the way businesses plan and execute EA strategies.
nodes.author: www.boc-group.com

nodes.label: With AI, organizations can analyze vast amounts of data to uncover patterns, pre
nodes.text: With AI, organizations can analyze vast amounts of data to uncover patterns, predict outcomes, and make smarter decisions.
nodes.author: www.boc-group.com

nodes.label: Furthermore it enables automated insights and scenario planning, making it a cru
nodes.text: Furthermore it enables automated insights and scenario planning, making it a crucial tool for aligning architectures with strategic goals.
nodes.author: www.boc-group.com

nodes.label: The ability to forecast risks, optimize processes, and simulate scenarios ensure
nodes.text: The ability to forecast risks, optimize processes, and simulate scenarios ensures that enterprises stay agile in an unpredictable market. AI also accelerates the decision-making process, providing leaders with actionable intelligence in real-time.
nodes.author: www.boc-group.com

nodes.label: It’s important to synchronize AI strategies with core strengths and objectives t
nodes.text: It’s important to synchronize AI strategies with core strengths and objectives to guarantee tangible value and competitive edge.
nodes.author: www.boc-group.com

nodes.label: Hint : Learn more about AI roadmaps and discover how to build them with a capabi
nodes.text: Hint : Learn more about AI roadmaps and discover how to build them with a capability-focused strategy.
nodes.author: www.boc-group.com

nodes.label: 2. Cloud-Native Architectures: Empowering Flexibility and Growth
nodes.text: 2. Cloud-Native Architectures: Empowering Flexibility and Growth
nodes.author: www.boc-group.com

nodes.label: As businesses increasingly rely on digital solutions, cloud-native architectures
nodes.text: As businesses increasingly rely on digital solutions, cloud-native architectures have emerged as the foundation for scalability, flexibility, and cost efficiency.
nodes.author: www.boc-group.com

nodes.label: These architectures allow organizations to deploy, test, and adapt solutions fas
nodes.text: These architectures allow organizations to deploy, test, and adapt solutions faster than ever, ensuring that systems remain competitive and relevant.
nodes.author: www.boc-group.com

nodes.label: Cloud-native strategies also enhance disaster recovery, improve system resilienc
nodes.text: Cloud-native strategies also enhance disaster recovery, improve system resilience, and facilitate seamless integration with emerging technologies such as IoT and AI.
nodes.author: www.boc-group.com

nodes.label: By leveraging cloud-native platforms, businesses can effectively model, manage,
nodes.text: By leveraging cloud-native platforms, businesses can effectively model, manage, and optimize their cloud environments, enabling deeper insights and streamlined operations.
nodes.author: www.boc-group.com

nodes.label: Hint : Uncover the key advantages of SaaS solutions or how to model your AWS and
nodes.text: Hint : Uncover the key advantages of SaaS solutions or how to model your AWS and Azure cloud architectures.
nodes.author: www.boc-group.com

nodes.label: 3. Sustainability-Driven Architectures: A Green Revolution
nodes.text: 3. Sustainability-Driven Architectures: A Green Revolution
nodes.author: www.boc-group.com

nodes.label: Sustainability is no longer a “nice-to-have”– it’s a business need. Modern EA in
nodes.text: Sustainability is no longer a “nice-to-have”– it’s a business need. Modern EA incorporates eco-friendly design principles to reduce environmental impact while improving operational efficiency.
nodes.author: www.boc-group.com

nodes.label: Whether through energy-efficient systems, sustainable supply chains, or reducing
nodes.text: Whether through energy-efficient systems, sustainable supply chains, or reducing the carbon footprint of IT infrastructures, businesses can enhance their reputation and cut costs by embracing green architectures.
nodes.author: www.boc-group.com

nodes.label: It’s important to incorporate sustainability into your architectural strategies
nodes.text: It’s important to incorporate sustainability into your architectural strategies by analyzing the organization’s operating models in regards of sustainability improvements and defining sustainability roadmaps. This enables data-driven decisions that align with eco-friendly goals.
nodes.author: www.boc-group.com

nodes.label: Hint : Find out how Sustainability and Enterprise Architecture fit together and
nodes.text: Hint : Find out how Sustainability and Enterprise Architecture fit together and how to build a Sustainability Roadmap .
nodes.author: www.boc-group.com

nodes.label: 4. Human-Centric and Experience-Driven Design: People at the Core
nodes.text: 4. Human-Centric and Experience-Driven Design: People at the Core
nodes.author: www.boc-group.com

nodes.label: Enterprise systems must prioritize user experience (UX) to maximize adoption, pr
nodes.text: Enterprise systems must prioritize user experience (UX) to maximize adoption, productivity, and satisfaction. Human-centric EA goes beyond creating functional solutions by focusing on intuitive design and seamless workflows.
nodes.author: www.boc-group.com

nodes.label: By tailoring architectures to meet the needs of employees, partners, and custome
nodes.text: By tailoring architectures to meet the needs of employees, partners, and customers, businesses create environments where technology complements rather than complicates daily operations.
nodes.author: www.boc-group.com

nodes.label: User-friendly interfaces and collaborative features enable team collaboration an
nodes.text: User-friendly interfaces and collaborative features enable team collaboration and create architectures designed for real-world usability and long-term success.
nodes.author: www.boc-group.com

nodes.label: Hint : Check out how ADOIT´s newest feature ADOIT Forms sets new standards for u
nodes.text: Hint : Check out how ADOIT´s newest feature ADOIT Forms sets new standards for user-friendly interfaces in EA.
nodes.author: www.boc-group.com

nodes.label: 5. Strategic Planning and Agile Roadmaps: Navigating Change
nodes.text: 5. Strategic Planning and Agile Roadmaps: Navigating Change
nodes.author: www.boc-group.com

nodes.label: A strong EA roadmap aligns long-term objectives with immediate business needs. I
nodes.text: A strong EA roadmap aligns long-term objectives with immediate business needs. In today’s fast-changing market, agility is key, and businesses need roadmaps that can adapt to shifting conditions while ensuring strategic alignment.
nodes.author: www.boc-group.com

nodes.label: This trend emphasizes continuous improvement, where feedback loops and iterative
nodes.text: This trend emphasizes continuous improvement, where feedback loops and iterative planning become integral to staying competitive.
nodes.author: www.boc-group.com

nodes.label: This is why creating adaptive, strategic roadmaps that align projects with busin
nodes.text: This is why creating adaptive, strategic roadmaps that align projects with business goals are key to the success of every business transformation.
nodes.author: www.boc-group.com

nodes.label: 6. Resilience and Security: Strengthening the Foundation
nodes.text: 6. Resilience and Security: Strengthening the Foundation
nodes.author: www.boc-group.com

nodes.label: In a digital-first world, the importance of resilience and security in Enterpris
nodes.text: In a digital-first world, the importance of resilience and security in Enterprise Architecture cannot be ignored.
nodes.author: www.boc-group.com

nodes.label: Organizations are increasingly focusing on building systems that can withstand d
nodes.text: Organizations are increasingly focusing on building systems that can withstand disruptions – whether from cyber threats, operational failures, or external crises.
nodes.author: www.boc-group.com

nodes.label: A resilient architecture ensures business continuity, while security measures bu
nodes.text: A resilient architecture ensures business continuity, while security measures build trust and protect critical assets.
nodes.author: www.boc-group.com

nodes.label: This trend highlights the need for proactive approaches, such as integrating rob
nodes.text: This trend highlights the need for proactive approaches, such as integrating robustness and reliability into systems from the beginning, ensuring that operations remain stable even in challenging circumstances.
nodes.author: www.boc-group.com

nodes.label: Mapping and assessing security measures within your EA ensures compliance with i
nodes.text: Mapping and assessing security measures within your EA ensures compliance with industry standards and reduces risks to your critical systems.
nodes.author: www.boc-group.com

nodes.label: Hint : Discover how to create a strong Risk Management practices in your EA proj
nodes.text: Hint : Discover how to create a strong Risk Management practices in your EA projects.
nodes.author: www.boc-group.com

nodes.label: 7. Data-Driven Decision-Making: Unlocking the Power of Information
nodes.text: 7. Data-Driven Decision-Making: Unlocking the Power of Information
nodes.author: www.boc-group.com

nodes.label: In the digital age, data is the cornerstone of effective decision-making. Data-d
nodes.text: In the digital age, data is the cornerstone of effective decision-making. Data-driven EA ensures that businesses leverage their information assets to drive innovation and improve operational efficiency.
nodes.author: www.boc-group.com

nodes.label: This involves integrating real-time analytics into architectural frameworks, emp
nodes.text: This involves integrating real-time analytics into architectural frameworks, empowering organizations to make faster, more informed decisions. It also emphasizes the importance of data governance, ensuring accuracy, security, and compliance.
nodes.author: www.boc-group.com

nodes.label: EA software that provides a comprehensive repository enables organizations to ca
nodes.text: EA software that provides a comprehensive repository enables organizations to catalog, evaluate, and align their data assets with strategic business objectives.
nodes.author: www.boc-group.com

nodes.label: Hint : Explore how data-driven portfolio management can turn data complexity int
nodes.text: Hint : Explore how data-driven portfolio management can turn data complexity into a strategic asset.
nodes.author: www.boc-group.com

nodes.label: The trends shaping Enterprise Architecture in 2025 reflect a blend of technologi
nodes.text: The trends shaping Enterprise Architecture in 2025 reflect a blend of technological innovation, sustainability, and human-centered design.
nodes.author: www.boc-group.com

nodes.label: By embracing AI, cloud-native solutions, and data-driven strategies, businesses
nodes.text: By embracing AI, cloud-native solutions, and data-driven strategies, businesses can stay agile and competitive.
nodes.author: www.boc-group.com

nodes.label: Prioritizing sustainability and security ensures long-term success, while user-c
nodes.text: Prioritizing sustainability and security ensures long-term success, while user-centric and adaptive roadmaps drive continuous improvement.
nodes.author: www.boc-group.com

nodes.label: I. Introduction
nodes.text: I. Introduction
nodes.author: ieeexplore.ieee.org

nodes.label: Enterprise Architecture (EA) is a comparatively recently developed field of rese
nodes.text: Enterprise Architecture (EA) is a comparatively recently developed field of research that attempts to coordinate the objectives of various departments within an organization [1].
nodes.author: ieeexplore.ieee.org

nodes.label: There are numerous frameworks and methodologies available to researchers of this
nodes.text: There are numerous frameworks and methodologies available to researchers of this field such as The Open Group Framework [2].
nodes.author: ieeexplore.ieee.org

nodes.label: The majority of these methodologies and frameworks outline methods for represent
nodes.text: The majority of these methodologies and frameworks outline methods for representing the organization in order to evaluate its current operations and its potential for future operations [3].
nodes.author: ieeexplore.ieee.org

nodes.label: There are significant differences between organizations, but they share similari
nodes.text: There are significant differences between organizations, but they share similarities in their internal operations.
nodes.author: ieeexplore.ieee.org

nodes.label: Similarities that could also be referred to as patterns.
nodes.text: Similarities that could also be referred to as patterns.
nodes.author: ieeexplore.ieee.org

nodes.label: Closing the gap between what a business knows and what it does
nodes.text: Closing the gap between what a business knows and what it does

nodes.label: Historically, operational and analytical systems have operated in isolation, pre
nodes.text: Historically, operational and analytical systems have operated in isolation, preventing integration and limiting technology’s impact.
nodes.author: Deloitte

nodes.label: AI convergence architecture unifies data, artificial intelligence, and operation
nodes.text: AI convergence architecture unifies data, artificial intelligence, and operations, enabling real-time insights and actions across the enterprise, and helps turn advanced technology into tangible, transformative results.
nodes.author: Deloitte

nodes.label: Key insights
nodes.text: Key insights
nodes.author: Deloitte

nodes.label: Traditional silos hinder real-time action keeping valuable insights trapped in d
nodes.text: Traditional silos hinder real-time action keeping valuable insights trapped in dashboards,  and creating a gap between knowledge and action.
nodes.author: Deloitte

nodes.label: AI convergence architecture unifies intelligence and operations by linking insig
nodes.text: AI convergence architecture unifies intelligence and operations by linking insights to execution and making intelligence actionable across the business.
nodes.author: Deloitte

nodes.label: A layered, iterative approach meets brownfield reality by integrating convergenc
nodes.text: A layered, iterative approach meets brownfield reality by integrating convergence architecture through overlays, AI-native redesigns, and software as a services (SaaS), enabling gradual modernization without disruption.
nodes.author: Deloitte

nodes.label: Closed-loop intelligence fuels organizational learning, ensuring that every acti
nodes.text: Closed-loop intelligence fuels organizational learning, ensuring that every action generates feedback, continually enhancing insights and helping organizations learn, adapt, and act dynamically.
nodes.author: Deloitte

nodes.label: Human-centered design and governance are crucial for realizing the measurable be
nodes.text: Human-centered design and governance are crucial for realizing the measurable benefits of AI-first convergence, and require trust, security, and cross-functional collaboration.
nodes.author: Deloitte

nodes.label: Convergence architecture unifies operations, analytics, and AI in a flexible, la
nodes.text: Convergence architecture unifies operations, analytics, and AI in a flexible, layered design centered on an AI core. It bridges legacy and modern systems to support smarter human-centric outcomes.

nodes.label: Transforming industries with convergence architecture
nodes.text: Transforming industries with convergence architecture

nodes.label: Convergence architecture helps banks integrate legacy and modern systems and emb
nodes.text: Convergence architecture helps banks integrate legacy and modern systems and embed AI to deliver secure, adaptive, customer-centric services.
nodes.author: Deloitte

nodes.label: It enables real-time lending risk insights, consistent cross-channel personaliza
nodes.text: It enables real-time lending risk insights, consistent cross-channel personalization, and faster onboarding/KYC/AML through AI overlays, AI-native redesigns, and seamless SaaS/API connections.
nodes.author: Deloitte

nodes.label: Convergence architecture helps insurers modernize document-heavy operations by e
nodes.text: Convergence architecture helps insurers modernize document-heavy operations by embedding AI into claims and underwriting.
nodes.author: Deloitte

nodes.label: It accelerates triage and settlement, helps reduce fraud, and improves satisfact
nodes.text: It accelerates triage and settlement, helps reduce fraud, and improves satisfaction through AI overlays, AI-native workflow engines, and SaaS and API data, while also enabling real-time, behavior-based pricing and continuously adaptive risk models.
nodes.author: Deloitte

nodes.label: Convergence architecture helps retailers move from batch-driven to adaptive comm
nodes.text: Convergence architecture helps retailers move from batch-driven to adaptive commerce.
nodes.author: Deloitte

nodes.label: It connects legacy ERP and merchandising with AI to deliver real-time omnichanne
nodes.text: It connects legacy ERP and merchandising with AI to deliver real-time omnichannel inventory and flexible fulfillment, reduce stockouts and markdowns, and improve supplier collaboration and dynamic merchandising through trend sensing, forecasting, and SaaS/API integrations.

nodes.label: The era of convergence architecture marks a pivotal turning point, enabling orga
nodes.text: The era of convergence architecture marks a pivotal turning point, enabling organizations to transcend traditional system management and evolve into truly thinking, learning, and acting enterprises.
nodes.author: Deloitte

nodes.label: By weaving connective intelligence fabrics, embedding robust governance, and sel
nodes.text: By weaving connective intelligence fabrics, embedding robust governance, and selectively investing in transformational redesigns, organizations can unlock the full potential of AI and agents, creating seamless, closed-loop intelligence where every insight drives smarter action, and every action fuels continuous learning.

nodes.label: The Augmented Architect: Real
nodes.author: Charles Betz

nodes.label: Enterprise architecture (EA) has always aimed for clarity, control, and coherenc
nodes.text: Enterprise architecture (EA) has always aimed for clarity, control, and coherence.
nodes.author: Charles Betz

nodes.label: Yet its practitioners are often thwarted by an overwhelming paradox: They must g
nodes.text: Yet its practitioners are often thwarted by an overwhelming paradox: They must guide the evolution of vast, dynamic enterprises using tools and processes that are static, fragmented, and slow.
nodes.author: Charles Betz

nodes.label: The EA repository , intended as the source of truth, devolves into a dusty attic
nodes.text: The EA repository , intended as the source of truth, devolves into a dusty attic of outdated diagrams and deliverables.
nodes.author: Charles Betz

nodes.label: Architects are stretched thin, trying to make sense of sprawling portfolios with
nodes.text: Architects are stretched thin, trying to make sense of sprawling portfolios with limited visibility and time. “Data calls” are a weekly chore for both architects and stakeholders.
nodes.author: Charles Betz

nodes.label: Architecture review boards — meant to ensure alignment — are seen as bureaucrati
nodes.text: Architecture review boards — meant to ensure alignment — are seen as bureaucratic bottlenecks.
nodes.author: Charles Betz

nodes.label: But what if the EA function was no longer confined to episodic review and discon
nodes.text: But what if the EA function was no longer confined to episodic review and disconnected models? What if it operated in real time, continuously enriched by machine-readable data and supported by intelligent agents that advise, validate, and even act?
nodes.author: Charles Betz

nodes.label: This is not speculative fiction.
nodes.text: This is not speculative fiction.
nodes.author: Charles Betz

nodes.label: It is the emerging reality — a direct consequence of what we have called the sle
nodes.text: It is the emerging reality — a direct consequence of what we have called the sleeping giant waking up : the operationalization of architecture via closed feedback loops, AI agents , large language models (LLMs), retrieval-augmented generation, vector databases, and dynamic graph-based systems .
nodes.author: Charles Betz

nodes.label: The Feedback Loop Strikes Back
nodes.text: The Feedback Loop Strikes Back
nodes.author: Charles Betz

nodes.label: Traditional EA processes are largely open-loop . A proposal is submitted, review
nodes.text: Traditional EA processes are largely open-loop . A proposal is submitted, reviewed days or weeks later, deliberated in committee, and eventually approved — often based on stale information. By then, the initiative may have pivoted or the environment may have changed.
nodes.author: Charles Betz

nodes.label: Now imagine a closed-loop learning architecture system: Every update from a cont
nodes.text: Now imagine a closed-loop learning architecture system: Every update from a continuous integration/continuous delivery pipeline, every change in a cloud API, every deviation from policy becomes a signal.
nodes.author: Charles Betz

nodes.label: These signals are fed into a living architecture graph that reflects the true cu
nodes.text: These signals are fed into a living architecture graph that reflects the true current state of the enterprise.
nodes.author: Charles Betz

nodes.label: Agents ingest these signals and perform continuous analysis:
nodes.text: Agents ingest these signals and perform continuous analysis:
nodes.author: Charles Betz

nodes.label: Harvesting agents monitor the digital signals of the enterprise, extracting know
nodes.text: Harvesting agents monitor the digital signals of the enterprise, extracting knowledge into the information stores. Dependency agents are a specialization of those, mapping the digital estate’s interconnections and analyzing both automated data such as traces as well as architectural and unstructured information that may provide essential insights into higher-order, logical dependencies that are very real yet are not readily discoverable at a technical level.
nodes.author: Charles Betz

nodes.label: Dependency agents are a specialization of those, mapping the digital estate’s in
nodes.text: Dependency agents are a specialization of those, mapping the digital estate’s interconnections and analyzing both automated data such as traces as well as architectural and unstructured information that may provide essential insights into higher-order, logical dependencies that are very real yet are not readily discoverable at a technical level.
nodes.author: Charles Betz

nodes.label: Lifecycle-aware agents flag aging technologies, enabling technical debt diagnosi
nodes.text: Lifecycle-aware agents flag aging technologies, enabling technical debt diagnosis.
nodes.author: Charles Betz

nodes.label: Conformance agents validate proposals against approved tech stacks, standards, a
nodes.text: Conformance agents validate proposals against approved tech stacks, standards, and design patterns.
nodes.author: Charles Betz

nodes.label: Security and cost agents trace implications across risk, compliance, and spend.
nodes.text: Security and cost agents trace implications across risk, compliance, and spend.
nodes.author: Charles Betz

nodes.label: Architects are notified — not weeks after the fact but during or even before dec
nodes.text: Architects are notified — not weeks after the fact but during or even before decision points. The result is a form of continuous architecture governance — high-velocity, high-confidence, and fully traceable, supporting outcome-driven and valuable EA as never before.
nodes.author: Charles Betz

nodes.label: AI As Architecture Sidekick
nodes.text: AI As Architecture Sidekick
nodes.author: Charles Betz

nodes.label: AI augments the architect by continuously updating the repository to expose only
nodes.text: AI augments the architect by continuously updating the repository to expose only fresh data. That means no more digging through stale wikis or emailing 10 teams for basic system lifecycle info. Instead:
nodes.author: Charles Betz

nodes.label: Intelligent recommenders augment architecture artifacts with context, rationale,
nodes.text: Intelligent recommenders augment architecture artifacts with context, rationale, and even business continuity considerations.
nodes.author: Charles Betz

nodes.label: Diagram recognition agents convert scanned or even hand-drawn schematics into st
nodes.text: Diagram recognition agents convert scanned or even hand-drawn schematics into structured model elements.
nodes.author: Charles Betz

nodes.label: Pattern recognition agents detect anti-patterns and optimization opportunities.
nodes.text: Pattern recognition agents detect anti-patterns and optimization opportunities.
nodes.author: Charles Betz

nodes.label: Chatbots enable non-architects to interact with the repository, democratizing ar
nodes.text: Chatbots enable non-architects to interact with the repository, democratizing architecture insight.
nodes.author: Charles Betz

nodes.label: Generative agents propose transition roadmaps between current and target states
nodes.text: Generative agents propose transition roadmaps between current and target states based on actual feasibility, not just aspirational models.
nodes.author: Charles Betz

nodes.label: This is not just automation — it’s augmentation. Architects remain in the loop,
nodes.text: This is not just automation — it’s augmentation. Architects remain in the loop, but the loop is smaller, faster, and smarter.
nodes.author: Charles Betz

nodes.label: Solving The Classics — Finally
nodes.text: Solving The Classics — Finally
nodes.author: Charles Betz

nodes.label: Let’s revisit the perennial problems of enterprise architecture — and how real-t
nodes.text: Let’s revisit the perennial problems of enterprise architecture — and how real-time AI-augmented EA addresses them:
nodes.author: Charles Betz

nodes.label: Insufficient knowledge
nodes.text: Insufficient knowledge
nodes.author: Charles Betz

nodes.label: No human can know everything about a modern digital enterprise.
nodes.text: No human can know everything about a modern digital enterprise.
nodes.author: Charles Betz

nodes.label: AI doesn’t pretend to either — but it remembers everything and brings the right
nodes.text: AI doesn’t pretend to either — but it remembers everything and brings the right detail to the fore at the right time.
nodes.author: Charles Betz

nodes.label: Think of it as a cognitive prosthetic for the architect: surfacing precedents, w
nodes.text: Think of it as a cognitive prosthetic for the architect: surfacing precedents, warnings, and rationale at the point of decision.
nodes.author: Charles Betz

nodes.label: Insufficient visibility
nodes.text: Insufficient visibility
nodes.author: Charles Betz

nodes.label: Visibility isn’t just about having access to data — it’s about trust in its fres
nodes.text: Visibility isn’t just about having access to data — it’s about trust in its freshness.
nodes.author: Charles Betz

nodes.label: Real-time integration with operational sources (observability platforms, configu
nodes.text: Real-time integration with operational sources (observability platforms, configuration systems, source control, deployment records) ensures that the architecture graph is never out of date.
nodes.author: Charles Betz

nodes.label: The haystack becomes a needle-sorter.
nodes.text: The haystack becomes a needle-sorter.
nodes.author: Charles Betz

nodes.label: Fragmented deliverables
nodes.text: Fragmented deliverables
nodes.author: Charles Betz

nodes.label: Architecture artifacts multiply: PowerPoints, spreadsheets, PDFs, whiteboards.
nodes.text: Architecture artifacts multiply: PowerPoints, spreadsheets, PDFs, whiteboards.
nodes.author: Charles Betz

nodes.label: But in an agentic system, everything is rendered on demand from the same graph (
nodes.text: But in an agentic system, everything is rendered on demand from the same graph (and its associated unstructured content, linked via vector embeddings).
nodes.author: Charles Betz

nodes.label: Want a heatmap of system risks?
nodes.text: Want a heatmap of system risks?
nodes.author: Charles Betz

nodes.label: A regulatory trace?
nodes.text: A regulatory trace?
nodes.author: Charles Betz

nodes.label: A roadmap to sunset legacy?
nodes.text: A roadmap to sunset legacy?
nodes.author: Charles Betz

nodes.label: One prompt, one view — consistent, explainable, and composable.
nodes.text: One prompt, one view — consistent, explainable, and composable.
nodes.author: Charles Betz

nodes.label: And those unstructured artifacts?
nodes.text: And those unstructured artifacts?
nodes.author: Charles Betz

nodes.label: An agent is happy to harvest new insights from them back into the knowledge stor
nodes.text: An agent is happy to harvest new insights from them back into the knowledge store.
nodes.author: Charles Betz

nodes.label: Slow review cycles
nodes.text: Slow review cycles
nodes.author: Charles Betz

nodes.label: Review boards become decision accelerators instead of speed bumps.
nodes.text: Review boards become decision accelerators instead of speed bumps.
nodes.author: Charles Betz

nodes.label: Agents pre-check submissions.
nodes.text: Agents pre-check submissions.
nodes.author: Charles Betz

nodes.label: Exceptions, not compliance, become the focus.
nodes.text: Exceptions, not compliance, become the focus.
nodes.author: Charles Betz

nodes.label: Draft decisions are generated and validated before the meeting even starts.
nodes.text: Draft decisions are generated and validated before the meeting even starts.
nodes.author: Charles Betz

nodes.label: Architecture decision records are automatically created and updated, then immedi
nodes.text: Architecture decision records are automatically created and updated, then immediately operationalized in the agentic memories.
nodes.author: Charles Betz

nodes.label: Ivory tower perception
nodes.text: Ivory tower perception
nodes.author: Charles Betz

nodes.label: Abstractions are replaced with outcomes. Architects can show how a proposed chan
nodes.text: Abstractions are replaced with outcomes. Architects can show how a proposed change impacts a real customer journey, service-level agreement, or unit cost. The role regains relevance — no longer distant but embedded and explanatory.
nodes.author: Charles Betz

nodes.label: Architect As Prompt Engineer
nodes.text: Architect As Prompt Engineer
nodes.author: Charles Betz

nodes.label: Much like GitHub Copilot transformed software engineering — improving productivi
nodes.text: Much like GitHub Copilot transformed software engineering — improving productivity and satisfaction even in large-scale settings such as ANZ Bank — architects will increasingly work alongside copilots of their own.
nodes.author: Charles Betz

nodes.label: They will define acceptable patterns and reference architectures as they have al
nodes.text: They will define acceptable patterns and reference architectures as they have always done but with the support of LLMs to provide comprehensive, grounded feedback.
nodes.author: Charles Betz

nodes.label: They will curate the architecture graph, tasking agents with updates and correct
nodes.text: They will curate the architecture graph, tasking agents with updates and corrections, even large-scale schema refactorings and migrations.
nodes.author: Charles Betz

nodes.label: (This is not mere speculation.
nodes.text: (This is not mere speculation.
nodes.author: Charles Betz

nodes.label: Charlie has had Claude perform complex and error-prone refactorings on his perso
nodes.text: Charlie has had Claude perform complex and error-prone refactorings on his personal graph that would have taken a skilled database administrator hours).
nodes.author: Charles Betz

nodes.label: They will design guardrails and feedback loops.
nodes.text: They will design guardrails and feedback loops.
nodes.author: Charles Betz

nodes.label: They ask “What are the safe ways to evolve this system?” and let the agent gener
nodes.text: They ask “What are the safe ways to evolve this system?” and let the agent generate alternatives within constraints.
nodes.author: Charles Betz

nodes.label: The architect becomes a curator , facilitator , and, most importantly, a critica
nodes.text: The architect becomes a curator , facilitator , and, most importantly, a critical thinker in a system where AI can propose but should not dictate.
nodes.author: Charles Betz

nodes.label: As Stephane notes, “Every architect exposed to AI must be trained in critical th
nodes.text: As Stephane notes, “Every architect exposed to AI must be trained in critical thinking. There are no more Leonardos — but there is now AI.”
nodes.author: Charles Betz

nodes.label: The Architecture Operating System
nodes.text: The Architecture Operating System
nodes.author: Charles Betz

nodes.label: This isn’t just about better tooling. It’s a new mental model: the EA repository
nodes.text: This isn’t just about better tooling. It’s a new mental model: the EA repository as an operating system for change, not just a documentation graveyard. Agents don’t just read from it — they act on it.
nodes.author: Charles Betz

nodes.label: This system allows:
nodes.text: This system allows:
nodes.author: Charles Betz

nodes.label: Real-time detection of drift from standards.
nodes.text: Real-time detection of drift from standards.
nodes.author: Charles Betz

nodes.label: Integrated development environment-based design-time validation.
nodes.text: Integrated development environment-based design-time validation.
nodes.author: Charles Betz

nodes.label: Scenario modeling for investment planning.
nodes.text: Scenario modeling for investment planning.
nodes.author: Charles Betz

nodes.label: The net result is architectural agility — not at the expense of control but beca
nodes.text: The net result is architectural agility — not at the expense of control but because of it .
nodes.author: Charles Betz

nodes.label: Feedback Governance: A New Imperative
nodes.text: Feedback Governance: A New Imperative
nodes.author: Charles Betz

nodes.label: There’s much more to be said about how EA must govern AI itself (agentic decisio
nodes.text: There’s much more to be said about how EA must govern AI itself (agentic decision rights, anyone?).
nodes.author: Charles Betz

nodes.label: See especially Interoperability Is Key To Unlocking Agentic AI’s Future by Lesli
nodes.text: See especially Interoperability Is Key To Unlocking Agentic AI’s Future by Leslie Joseph and Rowan Curran .
nodes.author: Charles Betz

nodes.label: But one principle stands out: Treat feedback loops as first-class architecture.
nodes.text: But one principle stands out: Treat feedback loops as first-class architecture.
nodes.author: Charles Betz

nodes.label: Establish feedback system maps, metrics for loop health (performance, quality),
nodes.text: Establish feedback system maps, metrics for loop health (performance, quality), and tooling to surface unintended consequences in AI-driven decisions.
nodes.author: Charles Betz

nodes.label: This shift turns EA from a designer of structures to a steward of behavioral sys
nodes.text: This shift turns EA from a designer of structures to a steward of behavioral systems — where loops, not just stacks, matter most.
nodes.author: Charles Betz

nodes.label: Toward Democratization And Literacy
nodes.text: Toward Democratization And Literacy
nodes.author: Charles Betz

nodes.label: Perhaps the most profound impact of this new model is how it democratizes archit
nodes.text: Perhaps the most profound impact of this new model is how it democratizes architecture. With chat interfaces, visualization tools, and explainable AI, stakeholders far beyond the EA team can engage:
nodes.author: Charles Betz

nodes.label: Product owners query impacts of new features.
nodes.text: Product owners query impacts of new features.
nodes.author: Charles Betz

nodes.label: Risk managers explore security posture in seconds.
nodes.text: Risk managers explore security posture in seconds.
nodes.author: Charles Betz

nodes.label: Executives simulate platform shifts on cost and performance.
nodes.text: Executives simulate platform shifts on cost and performance.
nodes.author: Charles Betz

nodes.label: Architecture becomes a shared language of the enterprise — not a priesthood.
nodes.text: Architecture becomes a shared language of the enterprise — not a priesthood.
nodes.author: Charles Betz

nodes.label: Final Word: A Living, Learning Function
nodes.text: Final Word: A Living, Learning Function
nodes.author: Charles Betz

nodes.label: The irony is rich: Architecture, once thought too rigid to keep up with digital
nodes.text: The irony is rich: Architecture, once thought too rigid to keep up with digital change, may now lead it.
nodes.author: Charles Betz

nodes.label: We are witnessing the rebirth of EA as a living, learning function — a system of
nodes.text: We are witnessing the rebirth of EA as a living, learning function — a system of intelligence powered by feedback loops, driven by data, and guided by augmented human judgment.
nodes.author: Charles Betz

nodes.label: In that future, architects don’t merely draw the map. They design the compass, p
nodes.text: In that future, architects don’t merely draw the map. They design the compass, program the guide, and ensure that the journey stays on course — even as the terrain shifts beneath them.
nodes.author: Charles Betz

nodes.label: The sleeping giant is not only awake.
nodes.text: The sleeping giant is not only awake.
nodes.author: Charles Betz

nodes.label: It’s thinking, collaborating, and architecting in real time.
nodes.text: It’s thinking, collaborating, and architecting in real time.
nodes.author: Charles Betz

nodes.label: PS — Finally, as a personal note, I (Charlie) want to encourage architects who —
nodes.text: PS — Finally, as a personal note, I (Charlie) want to encourage architects who — like me — might have been hands-off for a while. If you’ve had technical chops at any point in your career, generative AI’s acceleration is a revelation.
nodes.author: Charles Betz

nodes.label: As an architect I often got pulled into proofs of concept.
nodes.text: As an architect I often got pulled into proofs of concept.
nodes.author: Charles Betz

nodes.label: It was always the same headache – getting things wired correctly and initially s
nodes.text: It was always the same headache – getting things wired correctly and initially stood up was a slog.
nodes.author: Charles Betz

nodes.label: This week, I wanted to wire up Claude to Model Context Protocol, and there were
nodes.text: This week, I wanted to wire up Claude to Model Context Protocol, and there were issues in the configuration.
nodes.author: Charles Betz

nodes.label: I uploaded a couple of files, it fixed the path and environment variable issues
nodes.text: I uploaded a couple of files, it fixed the path and environment variable issues (the usual headaches), and boom, I had Claude talking to Neo4j — the kind of technical progress that was easy to waste a day on, not so long ago.
nodes.author: Charles Betz

nodes.label: Stuff just works.
nodes.text: Stuff just works.
nodes.author: Charles Betz

nodes.label: Y ou cut to the chase and start working with whatever new thing you’re curious a
nodes.text: Y ou cut to the chase and start working with whatever new thing you’re curious about, and once you’ve got the environment configured, you’re off to the races with the LLM building reasonable POC code (at least) via prompts.
nodes.author: Charles Betz

nodes.label: The net-net is: There’s really no excuse for an architect not being hands-on any
nodes.text: The net-net is: There’s really no excuse for an architect not being hands-on anymore. Of course, “hands on” is starting to mean something very, very different….
nodes.author: Charles Betz

nodes.label: 7 architecture considerations for generative AI
nodes.author: Accenture

nodes.label: 7 architecture considerations for generative AI
nodes.text: 7 architecture considerations for generative AI
nodes.author: Accenture

nodes.label: Create the right foundation for scaling generative AI securely, responsibly, cos
nodes.text: Create the right foundation for scaling generative AI securely, responsibly, cost effectively—and in a way that delivers real business value.
nodes.author: Accenture

nodes.label: 5-minute read June 4, 2023 The latest generation of generative AI (Gen AI) appli
nodes.text: 5-minute read June 4, 2023 The latest generation of generative AI (Gen AI) applications has taken the world by storm.
nodes.author: Accenture

nodes.label: User adoption is exploding.
nodes.text: User adoption is exploding.
nodes.author: Accenture

nodes.label: New services are coming to market almost daily.
nodes.text: New services are coming to market almost daily.
nodes.author: Accenture

nodes.label: And business leaders are understandably eager to tap into the power of this new
nodes.text: And business leaders are understandably eager to tap into the power of this new technology.
nodes.author: Accenture

nodes.label: This is having a truly democratizing effect.
nodes.text: This is having a truly democratizing effect.
nodes.author: Accenture

nodes.label: Gen AI promises to empower every kind of business, including smaller companies a
nodes.text: Gen AI promises to empower every kind of business, including smaller companies and those that have historically lagged in tech maturity.
nodes.author: Accenture

nodes.label: Why? Because much of the hard AI development work has already been done pre-trai
nodes.text: Why? Because much of the hard AI development work has already been done pre-training the foundation models. So the emphasis shifts from data science to domain expertise. And that’s something every successful business has in abundance.
nodes.author: Accenture

nodes.label: It means, whatever the size of your company, you now have the opportunity to cre
nodes.text: It means, whatever the size of your company, you now have the opportunity to create extremely powerful and differentiating Gen AI solutions by applying foundation models to your unique data and expert business know-how.
nodes.author: Accenture

nodes.label: We've seen the possibilities for our clients evolve rapidly. I recently sat down
nodes.text: We've seen the possibilities for our clients evolve rapidly. I recently sat down with Accenture’s Chief AI Architect, Atish Ray, to discuss what companies need to consider when getting their enterprises generative-AI ready.
nodes.author: Accenture

nodes.label: Time to get your enterprise generative AI ready
nodes.text: Time to get your enterprise generative AI ready
nodes.author: Accenture

nodes.label: Like any new foundational technology, you need to make sure you can scale Gen AI
nodes.text: Like any new foundational technology, you need to make sure you can scale Gen AI securely, responsibly, cost-effectively and in a way that delivers real value to the business.
nodes.author: Accenture

nodes.label: – Atish Ray, Chief AI Architect An example: Consider all the different AI models
nodes.text: – Atish Ray, Chief AI Architect An example: Consider all the different AI models your business has to build and manage today. If you’re a large organization, they probably number in the hundreds. But when you start using pre-trained foundation models, you can bring that number down radically.
nodes.author: Accenture

nodes.label: Instead of having to create a new model for each new use case, you can fine tune
nodes.text: Instead of having to create a new model for each new use case, you can fine tune a small collection of pre-trained foundation models to achieve the same result.
nodes.author: Accenture

nodes.label: At the same time, instead of incorporating the domain intelligence always within
nodes.text: At the same time, instead of incorporating the domain intelligence always within ML models, you have the option to manage it outside while using the pre-trained models to generate them.
nodes.author: Accenture

nodes.label: And that fundamentally changes the way you need to think about your architecture
nodes.text: And that fundamentally changes the way you need to think about your architecture.
nodes.author: Accenture

nodes.label: So, what should business leaders do now to get Gen AI-ready? We believe there ar
nodes.text: So, what should business leaders do now to get Gen AI-ready? We believe there are seven key questions to ask.
nodes.author: Accenture

nodes.label: 1. Which foundation model should we use?
nodes.text: 1. Which foundation model should we use?
nodes.author: Accenture

nodes.label: The number of Gen AI models—and vendors—is growing all the time. Pure-play vendo
nodes.text: The number of Gen AI models—and vendors—is growing all the time. Pure-play vendors like OpenAI and Cohere are offering next generation models as service, developed through fundamental research and trained on a large corpus of publicly available data.
nodes.author: Accenture

nodes.label: At the same time, a significant number of matured open-source models are now ava
nodes.text: At the same time, a significant number of matured open-source models are now available via hubs like Hugging Face.
nodes.author: Accenture

nodes.label: Cloud hyperscalers are also getting into the game by partnering with the pure-pl
nodes.text: Cloud hyperscalers are also getting into the game by partnering with the pure-plays, adopting open-source models, pre-training their own models and also providing full-stack services.
nodes.author: Accenture

nodes.label: We're seeing more and more models-as-service that are pre-trained on specialized
nodes.text: We're seeing more and more models-as-service that are pre-trained on specialized domain knowledge become available.
nodes.author: Accenture

nodes.label: The good news is all options are increasingly viable.
nodes.text: The good news is all options are increasingly viable.
nodes.author: Accenture

nodes.label: Lately, the introduction of smaller and lower-cost foundation models (such as Da
nodes.text: Lately, the introduction of smaller and lower-cost foundation models (such as Databricks’ Dolly ) is making building or customizing Gen AI increasingly accessible.
nodes.author: Accenture

nodes.label: However, all options mandate careful considerations to ensure they fit your orga
nodes.text: However, all options mandate careful considerations to ensure they fit your organization’s needs and asks.
nodes.author: Accenture

nodes.label: 2. How should I make these models accessible for us?
nodes.text: 2. How should I make these models accessible for us?
nodes.author: Accenture

nodes.label: Atish explains the two principal approaches businesses can take to access Gen AI
nodes.text: Atish explains the two principal approaches businesses can take to access Gen AI models: “The first is to go for “full control” by deploying the models on your own public cloud (e.g., cloud hyperscalers) or private infrastructure (e.g., private cloud, data centers).
nodes.author: Accenture

nodes.label: The second is to opt for speed and simplicity by accessing Gen AI as a managed c
nodes.text: The second is to opt for speed and simplicity by accessing Gen AI as a managed cloud service from an external vendor.
nodes.author: Accenture

nodes.label: Both options have their merits.
nodes.text: Both options have their merits.
nodes.author: Accenture

nodes.label: But if you choose full control, you need to be aware there are several additiona
nodes.text: But if you choose full control, you need to be aware there are several additional factors to consider.” These factors include identifying and managing the right infrastructure for these models, version controlling the models, developing associated talent and skills, developing full-stack services for easier adoption and more.
nodes.author: Accenture

nodes.label: There are also specialized infrastructure choices like GPUs from Nvidia or integ
nodes.text: There are also specialized infrastructure choices like GPUs from Nvidia or integrated appliance optimized across next-generation processers and model computation workloads from emerging players like SambaNova.
nodes.author: Accenture

nodes.label: Having dedicated infrastructure does give you a better cost predictability for G
nodes.text: Having dedicated infrastructure does give you a better cost predictability for Gen AI models, but it comes with additional complexity and effort to achieve the right performance at enterprise scale.
nodes.author: Accenture

nodes.label: 3. How will we adapt models to our own data for consumption?
nodes.text: 3. How will we adapt models to our own data for consumption?
nodes.author: Accenture

nodes.label: Getting maximum business value from Gen AI often depends on leveraging your prop
nodes.text: Getting maximum business value from Gen AI often depends on leveraging your proprietary data to boost accuracy, performance and usefulness within the enterprise.
nodes.author: Accenture

nodes.label: There are several ways that you can adapt pre-trained models with your own data
nodes.text: There are several ways that you can adapt pre-trained models with your own data in order to consume within the organization.
nodes.author: Accenture

nodes.label: We like to summarize this as “buy, build or boost.”
nodes.text: We like to summarize this as “buy, build or boost.”
nodes.author: Accenture

nodes.label: You can buy a completely pre-trained model “off the shelf” and use in-context le
nodes.text: You can buy a completely pre-trained model “off the shelf” and use in-context learning techniques for getting responses with your data
nodes.author: Accenture

nodes.label: You can also take a model that is largely pre-trained and boost it by adding you
nodes.text: You can also take a model that is largely pre-trained and boost it by adding your data on top through fine-tuning.
nodes.author: Accenture

nodes.label: You can certainly build your own model ground-up (or pre-train further from open
nodes.text: You can certainly build your own model ground-up (or pre-train further from open-sourced ones) on your own infrastructure using your own data.
nodes.author: Accenture

nodes.label: Of course, to do this at speed and scale, you first need a modern data foundatio
nodes.text: Of course, to do this at speed and scale, you first need a modern data foundation , as part of the enterprise digital core, that makes it easier to consume data through the foundation models. This is a prerequisite for extracting accelerated and exponential value with Gen AI.
nodes.author: Accenture

nodes.label: Architecture implications across the layers of generative AI
nodes.text: Architecture implications across the layers of generative AI
nodes.author: Accenture

nodes.label: 4. What’s our overall enterprise readiness?
nodes.text: 4. What’s our overall enterprise readiness?
nodes.author: Accenture

nodes.label: Clearly, it’s important that foundation models meet the overall security, reliab
nodes.text: Clearly, it’s important that foundation models meet the overall security, reliability and responsibility requirements of the enterprise. Integration and interoperability frameworks are also key considerations for enabling full-stack solutions with foundation models in the enterprise.
nodes.author: Accenture

nodes.label: But for the AI to be enterprise-ready, organization have to trust the AI .
nodes.text: But for the AI to be enterprise-ready, organization have to trust the AI .
nodes.author: Accenture

nodes.label: And that raises all sorts of considerations.
nodes.text: And that raises all sorts of considerations.
nodes.author: Accenture

nodes.label: Companies must carefully consider Responsible AI implications of adopting this t
nodes.text: Companies must carefully consider Responsible AI implications of adopting this technology for sensitive business functions.
nodes.author: Accenture

nodes.label: Built-in capabilities from Gen AI vendors are maturing, but for now, you need to
nodes.text: Built-in capabilities from Gen AI vendors are maturing, but for now, you need to look at developing your own controls and mitigation techniques as appropriate.
nodes.author: Accenture

nodes.label: There are several practical actions companies can take to ensure Gen AI doesn’t
nodes.text: There are several practical actions companies can take to ensure Gen AI doesn’t threaten enterprise security. Adopting Gen AI is an ideal time to review your overall AI governance standards and operating models.
nodes.author: Accenture

nodes.label: 5. What about the environmental impact?
nodes.text: 5. What about the environmental impact?
nodes.author: Accenture

nodes.label: Although they come pre-trained, foundation models can still have significant ene
nodes.text: Although they come pre-trained, foundation models can still have significant energy requirements during adaptation and fine-tuning.
nodes.author: Accenture

nodes.label: If you are considering pre-training your own model or building your own model fr
nodes.text: If you are considering pre-training your own model or building your own model from the ground-up, this becomes very significant.
nodes.author: Accenture

nodes.label: There are different implications depending on the approach taken to buy, boost o
nodes.text: There are different implications depending on the approach taken to buy, boost or build the foundation models.
nodes.author: Accenture

nodes.label: Left unchecked, this will negatively impact the organization’s carbon footprint,
nodes.text: Left unchecked, this will negatively impact the organization’s carbon footprint, especially when applications based on Gen AI are scaled up across the enterprise.
nodes.author: Accenture

nodes.label: So, the potential environmental impact needs to be considered up front in making
nodes.text: So, the potential environmental impact needs to be considered up front in making the right choices about the available options.
nodes.author: Accenture

nodes.label: Accenture has developed tools like Green Cloud Advisor, which can support this p
nodes.text: Accenture has developed tools like Green Cloud Advisor, which can support this process.
nodes.author: Accenture

nodes.label: 6. How can we industrialize Gen AI app development?
nodes.text: 6. How can we industrialize Gen AI app development?
nodes.author: Accenture

nodes.label: Having chosen and deployed a foundation model, companies then need to consider w
nodes.text: Having chosen and deployed a foundation model, companies then need to consider what new frameworks may be required to industrialize and accelerate application development.
nodes.author: Accenture

nodes.label: Having vector databases or domain knowledge graphs that capture your business da
nodes.text: Having vector databases or domain knowledge graphs that capture your business data and broader knowledge (such as how business concepts are structured) also become important for developing valuable applications with Gen AI.
nodes.author: Accenture

nodes.label: Consider vectorization capabilities offered by some emerging players and cloud s
nodes.text: Consider vectorization capabilities offered by some emerging players and cloud service providers.
nodes.author: Accenture

nodes.label: Prompt engineering techniques are fast becoming a differentiating capability.
nodes.text: Prompt engineering techniques are fast becoming a differentiating capability.
nodes.author: Accenture

nodes.label: And by industrializing the process, you can build up a corpus of efficient, well
nodes.text: And by industrializing the process, you can build up a corpus of efficient, well-designed prompts and templates that are aligned to specific business functions or domains.
nodes.author: Accenture

nodes.label: Look to incorporate enterprise frameworks to scale collaboration and management
nodes.text: Look to incorporate enterprise frameworks to scale collaboration and management around them.
nodes.author: Accenture

nodes.label: An orchestration framework is key for application enablement as stitching togeth
nodes.text: An orchestration framework is key for application enablement as stitching together a Gen AI application involves coordinating multiple components, services and steps.
nodes.author: Accenture

nodes.label: Several frameworks and services are emerging but still nascent.
nodes.text: Several frameworks and services are emerging but still nascent.
nodes.author: Accenture

nodes.label: This includes workflow components that would incorporate critical human-in-the-l
nodes.text: This includes workflow components that would incorporate critical human-in-the-loop process flows that are a must for multiple usage scenarios.
nodes.author: Accenture

nodes.label: Similarly, industrializing the process of getting feedback from domain experts c
nodes.text: Similarly, industrializing the process of getting feedback from domain experts can be a key accelerator. Emerging solutions like Scale.AI now offer reinforcement learning with human feedback, making it easier for domain experts to label data, model edge cases and so on.
nodes.author: Accenture

nodes.label: 7. What do we need to operate Gen AI at scale?
nodes.text: 7. What do we need to operate Gen AI at scale?
nodes.author: Accenture

nodes.label: “As your Gen AI applications come up and running, you should consider the impact
nodes.text: “As your Gen AI applications come up and running, you should consider the impact on your operability," says Atish.
nodes.author: Accenture

nodes.label: Some companies have already developed an MLOps framework to productize ML applic
nodes.text: Some companies have already developed an MLOps framework to productize ML applications.
nodes.author: Accenture

nodes.label: Those standards require a thorough review to incorporate LLMOps and Gen AIOps co
nodes.text: Those standards require a thorough review to incorporate LLMOps and Gen AIOps considerations and accommodate changes in DevOps, CI/CD/CT, model management, model monitoring, prompt management and data/knowledge management in both pre-production and production environments.
nodes.author: Accenture

nodes.label: The MLOps approach will have to evolve for the world of foundation models, consi
nodes.text: The MLOps approach will have to evolve for the world of foundation models, considering processes across the whole application lifecycle.
nodes.author: Accenture

nodes.label: Moreover, as Gen AI leads to AutoGPT—where AI powers much more of the end-to-end
nodes.text: Moreover, as Gen AI leads to AutoGPT—where AI powers much more of the end-to-end process—we’ll see AI driving an operations architecture that automates productionizing, monitoring and calibrating these models and model interactions to continue to deliver business SLA.
nodes.author: Accenture

nodes.label: Adapt architecture and accelerate value
nodes.text: Adapt architecture and accelerate value
nodes.author: Accenture

nodes.label: By answering these architecture questions, organizations can position themselves
nodes.text: By answering these architecture questions, organizations can position themselves to scale Gen AI with maximum efficiency and effectiveness and foster successful adoption across the enterprise.
nodes.author: Accenture

nodes.label: But it’s important to bear in mind one additional point: Success with Gen AI is
nodes.text: But it’s important to bear in mind one additional point: Success with Gen AI is not just about getting the right architecture or even the right technology.
nodes.author: Accenture

nodes.label: It’s also about the people—both technical and non-technical—their skills and cap
nodes.text: It’s also about the people—both technical and non-technical—their skills and capabilities, their data and AI literacy, and the way they would work with the new technologies day-to-day.
nodes.author: Accenture

nodes.label: Managing the impact of that change on effected people is also critical for succe
nodes.text: Managing the impact of that change on effected people is also critical for success.
nodes.author: Accenture

nodes.label: This also demands a lot of flexibility from business and technology leaders.
nodes.text: This also demands a lot of flexibility from business and technology leaders.
nodes.author: Accenture

nodes.label: Because the technology’s moving so fast, it’s impossible to know for certain how
nodes.text: Because the technology’s moving so fast, it’s impossible to know for certain how the next few years will play out as an ecosystem of capabilities emerges around the foundation models.
nodes.author: Accenture

nodes.label: Adaptiveness and responsiveness—in the organization as well as IT—are also going
nodes.text: Adaptiveness and responsiveness—in the organization as well as IT—are also going to be essential in capturing the full value of this exciting step-change in AI capability.
nodes.author: Accenture

nodes.label: How Agentic AI Elevates The Enterprise Architect’s Role
nodes.author: Stéphane Vanrechem

nodes.label: Enterprise architects are entering a transformative phase.
nodes.text: Enterprise architects are entering a transformative phase.
nodes.author: Stéphane Vanrechem

nodes.label: As agentic AI becomes embedded in enterprise architecture (EA) tools, it’s not j
nodes.text: As agentic AI becomes embedded in enterprise architecture (EA) tools, it’s not just automating tasks — it’s redefining the architect’s role.
nodes.author: Stéphane Vanrechem

nodes.label: In our latest report, The Future Of The Enterprise Architect’s Job , we explore
nodes.text: In our latest report, The Future Of The Enterprise Architect’s Job , we explore how agentic AI is reshaping EA and what architects must do to stay relevant in an AI-augmented enterprise.
nodes.author: Stéphane Vanrechem

nodes.label: Agentic AI Is Already Changing EA Tools
nodes.text: Agentic AI Is Already Changing EA Tools
nodes.author: Stéphane Vanrechem

nodes.label: Agentic AI is now a core feature of every major EA tool, as shown in our Forrest
nodes.text: Agentic AI is now a core feature of every major EA tool, as shown in our Forrester Wave™ evaluation of EA management suites .
nodes.author: Stéphane Vanrechem

nodes.label: These agents automate data validation, capability mapping, and artifact creation
nodes.text: These agents automate data validation, capability mapping, and artifact creation, freeing architects to focus on strategy and transformation.
nodes.author: Stéphane Vanrechem

nodes.label: Tools such as Celonis, SAP Signavio, and ServiceNow are integrating AI to suppor
nodes.text: Tools such as Celonis, SAP Signavio, and ServiceNow are integrating AI to support smarter decisions across business, data, application, and technology domains.
nodes.author: Stéphane Vanrechem

nodes.label: AI also improves data quality in EA repositories and enhances application portfo
nodes.text: AI also improves data quality in EA repositories and enhances application portfolio management capacity.
nodes.author: Stéphane Vanrechem

nodes.label: For example, process intelligence software now uses AI to mine inefficiencies an
nodes.text: For example, process intelligence software now uses AI to mine inefficiencies and recommend improvements, while agentic AI enables real-time feedback loops that continuously update EA repositories.
nodes.author: Stéphane Vanrechem

nodes.label: Architects Must Embrace New Strategic Roles
nodes.text: Architects Must Embrace New Strategic Roles
nodes.author: Stéphane Vanrechem

nodes.label: In an AI-driven landscape, architects must evolve. The report outlines four emer
nodes.text: In an AI-driven landscape, architects must evolve. The report outlines four emerging roles:
nodes.author: Stéphane Vanrechem

nodes.label: Customer-centric, employee-centric value mapper. Architects will map customer an
nodes.text: Customer-centric, employee-centric value mapper. Architects will map customer and employee experiences within value streams, building knowledge graphs that help connect architectural decisions to measurable business outcomes.
nodes.author: Stéphane Vanrechem

nodes.label: Digital twin strategist. Architects will simulate architecture options using AI-
nodes.text: Digital twin strategist. Architects will simulate architecture options using AI-powered digital twins to rehearse strategic bets and expose trade-offs.
nodes.author: Stéphane Vanrechem

nodes.label: Enterprise knowledge curator. Architects will govern semantic layers and train d
nodes.text: Enterprise knowledge curator. Architects will govern semantic layers and train data teams in retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) and GraphRAG to ensure that AI outputs are grounded in trusted context.
nodes.author: Stéphane Vanrechem

nodes.label: Agentic governance champion. Architects manage farms of AI agents, establishing
nodes.text: Agentic governance champion. Architects manage farms of AI agents, establishing guardrails and feedback loops to ensure accountability and alignment with business goals.
nodes.author: Stéphane Vanrechem

nodes.label: From Tech Custodian To Strategic Advisor
nodes.text: From Tech Custodian To Strategic Advisor
nodes.author: Stéphane Vanrechem

nodes.label: The EA mandate is shifting from IT optimization to business value creation.
nodes.text: The EA mandate is shifting from IT optimization to business value creation.
nodes.author: Stéphane Vanrechem

nodes.label: As agentic AI reshapes the enterprise, architects are uniquely positioned to orc
nodes.text: As agentic AI reshapes the enterprise, architects are uniquely positioned to orchestrate intelligent ecosystems.
nodes.author: Stéphane Vanrechem

nodes.label: They must lead with purpose, embedding AI into architectural practices while pre
nodes.text: They must lead with purpose, embedding AI into architectural practices while preserving human judgment and strategic foresight.
nodes.author: Stéphane Vanrechem

nodes.label: Enterprise architects must:
nodes.text: Enterprise architects must:
nodes.author: Stéphane Vanrechem

nodes.label: Reframe their role to govern and guide AI usage.
nodes.text: Reframe their role to govern and guide AI usage.
nodes.author: Stéphane Vanrechem

nodes.label: Maintain control over AI intent and validate outputs.
nodes.text: Maintain control over AI intent and validate outputs.
nodes.author: Stéphane Vanrechem

nodes.label: Follow a structured AI learning path to design feedback-aware systems.
nodes.text: Follow a structured AI learning path to design feedback-aware systems.
nodes.author: Stéphane Vanrechem

nodes.label: Build an end-to-end enterprise view across IT, data, and business processes.
nodes.text: Build an end-to-end enterprise view across IT, data, and business processes.
nodes.author: Stéphane Vanrechem

nodes.label: Use AI-assisted capability mapping and impact analysis to simulate change.
nodes.text: Use AI-assisted capability mapping and impact analysis to simulate change.

nodes.label: Building Enterprise AI Maturity
nodes.text: Building Enterprise AI Maturity
nodes.author: MIT CISR

nodes.label: With so much excitement and hype around AI, we pursued research that would help
nodes.text: With so much excitement and hype around AI, we pursued research that would help leaders make sense of the chaos and understand how enterprises create value with AI.
nodes.author: MIT CISR

nodes.label: This briefing describes the MIT CISR Enterprise AI Maturity model, which depicts
nodes.text: This briefing describes the MIT CISR Enterprise AI Maturity model, which depicts four stages of enterprise AI maturity we identified based on a 2022 MIT CISR survey of 721 companies.
nodes.author: MIT CISR

nodes.label: We found that financial performance improved at each stage, and we pinpointed ca
nodes.text: We found that financial performance improved at each stage, and we pinpointed capabilities an enterprise needs as it progresses through the stages.
nodes.author: MIT CISR

nodes.label: Artificial intelligence (AI) has been described as everything from just another
nodes.text: Artificial intelligence (AI) has been described as everything from just another technology to the beginning of the end of civilization.
nodes.author: MIT CISR

nodes.label: With so much excitement and hype around AI, we pursued research that would help
nodes.text: With so much excitement and hype around AI, we pursued research that would help leaders make sense of the chaos and understand how enterprises create value with AI.
nodes.author: MIT CISR

nodes.label: We identified four stages of enterprise AI maturity, based on our October 2022 s
nodes.text: We identified four stages of enterprise AI maturity, based on our October 2022 survey of 721 companies.
nodes.author: MIT CISR

nodes.label: We found that financial performance improved with each stage, and pinpointed cap
nodes.text: We found that financial performance improved with each stage, and pinpointed capabilities an enterprise needs as it progresses through the stages.
nodes.author: MIT CISR

nodes.label: The bottom line was that enterprises in the first two stages of AI maturity had
nodes.text: The bottom line was that enterprises in the first two stages of AI maturity had financial performance below industry average, while enterprises in stages 3 and 4 had financial performance well above industry average.
nodes.author: MIT CISR

nodes.label: These findings provided the basis for our MIT CISR Enterprise AI Maturity Model.
nodes.text: These findings provided the basis for our MIT CISR Enterprise AI Maturity Model.
nodes.author: MIT CISR

nodes.label: Given when we conducted the survey, the results primarily describe the relations
nodes.text: Given when we conducted the survey, the results primarily describe the relationship between use of analytical (aka traditional) AI and financial performance.
nodes.author: MIT CISR

nodes.label: To supplement the survey findings, in 2024 we interviewed sixteen executives at
nodes.text: To supplement the survey findings, in 2024 we interviewed sixteen executives at nine enterprises about both traditional and generative AI and their early thoughts on agentic and robotic AI. 1
nodes.author: MIT CISR

nodes.label: Four Stages of Enterprise AI Maturity
nodes.text: Four Stages of Enterprise AI Maturity
nodes.author: MIT CISR

nodes.label: Enterprises need to cumulatively build capabilities and learnings from AI as the
nodes.text: Enterprises need to cumulatively build capabilities and learnings from AI as they move toward a future-ready state of AI use. Each of the four stages of the enterprise AI maturity model describes what enterprises focus on in that stage (see figure 1).
